F38 Word in rule 14.26(1)(e) omitted (22.4.2014) by The Family Procedure (Amendment No. 3) Rules 2014 (S.I. 2014/843) , rules 1 , 39(b)


F39 Rule 14.26(1)(ee) inserted (22.4.2014) by The Family Procedure (Amendment No. 3) Rules 2014 (S.I. 2014/843) , rules 1 , 39(b)


### Amendment and revocation of orders E+W


14.27. —(1) Subject to paragraph (2), an application under—


may be made without serving a copy of the application notice.


(2) The court may direct that an application notice be served on such persons as it thinks fit.


(3) Where the court makes an order granting the application, a court officer will send the Registrar General a notice—


giving sufficient particulars of the order to enable the Registrar General to identify the case.


Marginal Citations


M6 Section 55 was amended by section 109(1) of and paragraph 412 of Schedule 8 to the Courts Act 2003.


### Keeping registers in the family proceedings court E+W
